creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
I am not planning to do further out-of-tree development of iichid, except may be GPIO bits. It matured enough to start process of inclusion in to the base. That is why devel version is not needed IMO.

Currently, latest commit is tagged with 0.0.3, https://reviews.freebsd.org/D25538 is created and it is awaiting for maintainer approval.

Anyway, iichid pull requests are welcome.
